title: Intel Vault
purpose: Archived daily-update cards that expired out of the active seven-day window. These remain searchable as historical source leads but must not appear as current updates.
boundary: Vault items are historical public-source leads. Re-check the source before treating them as current or before upgrading any claim.

items.title: Digital euro clears key European Parliament hurdle
items.summary: The ECB secured key parliamentary backing for the digital euro, with negotiations expected to proceed and a pilot reported for 2027 before a possible 2029 rollout.
items.evidenceBoundary: A parliamentary hurdle is not a final rollout. Track full Parliament vote, trilogue negotiations, limits, privacy guarantees, pilot design, merchant fees, and implementation law.
items.whyItMatters: This is a major current CBDC timer trigger: digital public money is moving from concept toward legislation, pilot and infrastructure design.
items.nextAction: Escalate CBDC timer through legislation, pilot, wallet integration, merchant rules, holding limits, and privacy architecture.
items.videoHook: The digital euro just moved from theory toward the machinery: law, pilot, wallet, limits, fees, privacy. That is the control-system lane to watch.
items.rumbleShortTitle: Digital Euro Clears Key Hurdle
items.rumbleLongTitle: CBDC Watch: Digital Euro Clears Parliamentary Hurdle As EU Pushes Sovereign Payment Rails

items.title: Five Eyes warns frontier AI cyber-attack capability could arrive within months
items.summary: Five Eyes cyber authorities reportedly warned that advanced AI models capable of major cyberattacks against governments and businesses may be only months away.
items.evidenceBoundary: A warning is not proof of a specific attack. Track agency statement, model capability claims, export restrictions, mitigations, and future incident evidence separately.
items.whyItMatters: This connects AI, intelligence agencies, cyber resilience, business risk, model controls, and security-state expansion into one high-priority timer lane.
items.nextAction: Move AI Breakout and Cyber Blackout clocks upward only through source-backed warnings, incidents, procurement, restrictions, or confirmed capability disclosures.
items.videoHook: Five Eyes just moved AI from tech hype into national-security cyber countdown. The question is not whether AI is magic. The question is who gets offensive capability first.
